data.name: Leva

weaponImprint.name: Schlitzohr
weaponImprint.trait: Stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. If the target is a boss unit, it is further increased by 1 point.
weaponImprint.effect: Electric damage dealt to enemies with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] by 10%/12%/14%/16%/18%/20%. Electric damage dealt to enemies in Stability Break is increased by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Electric debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to Girard Group units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: If you find the Doll before you friendly and approachable, you've most likely already stepped into her trap. If you fail to notice in time, Leva takes no responsibility for whatever losses follow—unless... that person is you. "Commander, you're not deliberately taking the loss, are you? Hehe♪ Well, that's fine too. How would you like me to take responsibility for you?"

skills.name: Dangerous Smile
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Fox's Scheme
skills.description:
At the start of the turn, when Leva triggers a [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction, she gains 1 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. If Leva has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased by 10%.

When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is applied to an enemy unit within her attack range , Leva performs one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. If this kills the target, she applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to the nearest enemy unit within range for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the turn, when Leva triggers a [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction, or when an enemy with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] dies within her attack range, she gains 1 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. If she has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased by 25%.

When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is applied to an enemy unit within her attack range , Leva performs one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. If this kills the target, she applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to the nearest enemy unit within range for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the turn, Leva gains 2 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1]. In addition, when Leva triggers a [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction, or when an enemy with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] dies within her attack range, Leva gains 1 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. If Leva has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased by 25%.

Leva's attack is increased by 15% the first time she reaches 4 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1] in battle.

When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is applied to an enemy target within range , Leva performs one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. If this kills the target, she applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to the nearest enemy unit within range for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn. She can also use the active skill [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0] after using the active skill [dollSkill:6a980cf6-a6ef-4779-90fd-4226ecdd269e] or [dollSkill:1b937eea-802b-477f-aaf1-b8ea7a33ec85].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
[effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] can be triggered 1 additional time. If an enemy unit with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] dies within Leva's attack range, she gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1].

When she has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased to 25% instead.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
She can use the active skill [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0] once after using the active skill Rational Suppression or Orderly Disruption.

At the start of the turn, she gains an additional stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva].

Leva's attack is increased by 15% the first time she reaches 4 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva] in a battle.

skills.name: Rational Suppression
skills.description: Select one direction, dealing AoE Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy units in a 7×3 tile area of the selected direction, applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to all enemies in the selected area for 2 turns, and generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select one direction, dealing AoE Electric damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy units in a 7×3 tile area of the selected direction, applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] and [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to all enemies in the selected area for 2 turns, and generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. The critical damage for this skill is increased by 25%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to all enemy targets within the skill's effective range for 2 turns. The critical damage for this skill is increased by 25%.

skills.name: Ordered Disruption
skills.description: Selects one tile within a 7 tiles, dealing AoE Electric damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile. Against targets with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], damage dealt is increased by 30%, and stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one tile within a 7 tiles, dealing AoE Electric damage equal to 130% of attack to all enemy targets within 3 tiles of the selected tile. Against targets with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], damage dealt is increased by 30%, and stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point. At the end of the action, Leva gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 130%. At the end of the action, Leva gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva].

skills.name: Quantum Calculation
skills.description: Deals AoE Electric damage equal to 60% of attack to all enemy targets within 7 tiles and generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. Leva gains [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] for 3 turns. After this attack, Leva can use the active skill Superconductive Strike once.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Deals AoE Electric damage equal to 60% of attack to all enemy targets within 7 tiles and generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. Leva gains [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] for 3 turns. After this attack, Leva can use the active skill Superconductive Strike once.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Leva cleanses all debuffs on self and deals AoE Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within 7 tiles and generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. Leva gains [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] for 3 turns. After this attack, Leva can use the active skill Superconductive Strike once.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Depending on the number of stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva] expended, the damage multiplier of [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0] is increased to 75%/90%/120%/180%, and the stability damage dealt is increased to 1 point/2 points/4 points/8 points.

When using [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0], ignores 15% of the target's defense. After this skill, Leva gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Damage multiplier is increased to 90%, and Leva cleanses all debuffs on self before making the attack. The multiplier from [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] is increased to 8%.

skills.name: Superconductive Strike
skills.description:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing melee Electric damage equal to 50% of attack to it. Before the skill resolves, generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles within 1 tile around the target for 3 turns.

Expends all stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. Depending on the number of stacks expended, the damage multiplier is changed to 60%/70%/85%/120%, and the stability damage dealt is changed to 1 point/2 points/3 points/6 points.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing melee Electric damage equal to 50% of attack to it. Before the skill resolves, generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles within 1 tile around the target for 3 turns.

Expends all stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. Depending on the number of stacks expended, the damage multiplier is changed to 75%/90%/120%/180%, and the stability damage dealt is changed to 1 point/2 points/4 points/8 points. This attack ignores 15% of the target's defense. After using this skill, Leva gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Depending on the number of stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva] expended, the damage multiplier of [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0] is increased to 75%/90%/120%/180%, and the stability damage dealt is increased to 1 point/2 points/4 points/8 points.

When using [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0], ignores 15% of the target's defense. After this skill, Leva gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva].

keys.effect: Damage dealt to enemy unit with Electric debuffs is increased by 7%.

The range of the [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] triggered by passive skill Fox's Scheme and the active skill Superconductive Strike is increased to 9 tiles. The number of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] can be triggered is increased by 1.

At the start of battle, Electric damage dealt by Leva is increased by 2% and stability damage is increased by 1 point for each Electric attributed Doll on the battlefield.

When attacking targets with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], critical damage is increased by 7%. If the target is in Stability Break, it is increased by an additional 7%.
At the start of the battle, Leva gains 2 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1] and 1 point of Confectance Index.
Damage dealt to enemy units in Stability Break is increased by 7%.
Before [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], Leva cleanses 1 buff on the target.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 3 - Play It by Ear

keys.effect: After using the active skill Superconductive Strike, gain [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0] for 1 turn.
Before an allied unit makes an active attack, Leva applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to enemy units within range for 1 turn.
At the start of the battle, gains [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] for 3 turns.

vertebrae.effect:
[effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] can be triggered 1 additional time. If an enemy unit with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] dies within Leva's attack range, she gains 1 stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1].

When she has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased to 25% instead.

Leva gains [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] for 3 turns. After this attack, Leva can use the active skill Superconductive Strike once.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Leva cleanses all debuffs on self and deals AoE Electric damage equal to 90% of attack to all enemy targets within 7 tiles and generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles for 3 turns. Leva gains [effect:885dbc3e-3004-43bd-ac86-f7c16d58e9c1|doll:leva] for 3 turns. After this attack, Leva can use the active skill Superconductive Strike once.

vertebrae.effect:
She can use the active skill [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0] once after using the active skill Rational Suppression or Orderly Disruption.

At the start of the turn, she gains an additional stack of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva].

Leva's attack is increased by 15% the first time she reaches 4 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva] in a battle.

doll.name: Leva
doll.effects: If you find the Doll before you friendly and approachable, you've most likely already stepped into her trap. If you fail to notice in time, Leva takes no responsibility for whatever losses follow—unless... that person is you. "Commander, you're not deliberately taking the loss, are you? Hehe♪ Well, that's fine too. How would you like me to take responsibility for you?"

skillsLevel3.name: Fox's Scheme
skillsLevel3.description:
At the start of the turn, when Leva triggers a [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction, she gains 1 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. If Leva has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased by 10%.

When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is applied to an enemy unit within her attack range , Leva performs one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. If this kills the target, she applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to the nearest enemy unit within range for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the turn, when Leva triggers a [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction, or when an enemy with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] dies within her attack range, she gains 1 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. If she has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased by 25%.

When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is applied to an enemy unit within her attack range , Leva performs one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. If this kills the target, she applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to the nearest enemy unit within range for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the turn, Leva gains 2 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1]. In addition, when Leva triggers a [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction, or when an enemy with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] dies within her attack range, Leva gains 1 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1|doll:leva]. If Leva has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt is increased by 25%.

Leva's attack is increased by 15% the first time she reaches 4 stacks of [effect:4ae27df6-1cae-453d-a5b5-84d769aa40f1] in battle.

When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is applied to an enemy target within range , Leva performs one instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing melee Electric damage equal to 60% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, as well as gaining 1 point of Confectance Index. If this kills the target, she applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to the nearest enemy unit within range for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn. She can also use the active skill [dollSkill:f5a673c7-9252-40fb-b92e-ac5875b8b3b0] after using the active skill [dollSkill:6a980cf6-a6ef-4779-90fd-4226ecdd269e] or [dollSkill:1b937eea-802b-477f-aaf1-b8ea7a33ec85].

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Electric debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

Considered a buff, cannot be cleansed.
